tasks.label: Web docker playwright auth
args: docker rm -f c64commander-e2e >/dev/null 2>&1 || true && mkdir -p .tmp/web-config && docker run -d --name c64commander-e2e -p 8080:8080 -v "$PWD/.tmp/web-config:/config" c64commander:local && for i in $(seq 1 30); do curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8080/healthz >/dev/null && break || sleep 1; done && PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_PORT=8080 PLAYWRIGHT_WORKERS=1 PLAYWRIGHT_DEVICES=web npx playwright test playwright/webPlatformAuth.spec.ts --project=web; status=$?; docker rm -f c64commander-e2e >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; exit $status

tasks.label: Web docker playwright auth clean
args: docker rm -f c64commander-e2e >/dev/null 2>&1 || true && rm -rf .tmp/web-config && mkdir -p .tmp/web-config && docker run -d --name c64commander-e2e -p 8080:8080 -v "$PWD/.tmp/web-config:/config" c64commander:local && for i in $(seq 1 30); do curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8080/healthz >/dev/null && break || sleep 1; done && PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_PORT=8080 PLAYWRIGHT_WORKERS=1 PLAYWRIGHT_DEVICES=web npx playwright test playwright/webPlatformAuth.spec.ts --project=web; status=$?; docker rm -f c64commander-e2e >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; exit $status

tasks.label: Web smoke host-net
args: set -euo pipefail; mkdir -p .tmp/web-config; chmod 0777 .tmp/web-config; docker rm -f c64commander-smoke >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; docker build -f web/Dockerfile -t c64commander:ci . >/dev/null; docker run -d --name c64commander-smoke --network host -v "$PWD/.tmp/web-config:/config" c64commander:ci >/dev/null; healthy=0; for i in $(seq 1 30); do if curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8080/healthz >/dev/null; then healthy=1; break; fi; sleep 1; done; if [[ "$healthy" != "1" ]]; then echo FAILED_HEALTH; docker logs c64commander-smoke | cat; exit 1; fi; curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8080/healthz | cat; docker rm -f c64commander-smoke >/dev/null

tasks.label: Web CI reproduce 18080
args: set -euo pipefail; mkdir -p .tmp/web-config; chmod 0777 .tmp/web-config; docker rm -f c64commander-smoke >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; docker build -f web/Dockerfile -t c64commander:ci . >/dev/null; docker run -d --name c64commander-smoke -p 18080:8080 -v "$PWD/.tmp/web-config:/config" c64commander:ci >/dev/null; healthy=0; for i in $(seq 1 30); do if curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:18080/healthz >/dev/null; then healthy=1; break; fi; sleep 1; done; if [[ "$healthy" != "1" ]]; then echo failed-health; docker logs c64commander-smoke | cat; exit 1; fi; curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:18080/healthz | cat; PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_PORT=18080 PLAYWRIGHT_WORKERS=1 PLAYWRIGHT_DEVICES=web npx playwright test playwright/webPlatformAuth.spec.ts --project=web; status=$?; docker rm -f c64commander-smoke >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; exit $status

tasks.label: Phase7 test coverage isolated
args: mkdir -p .tmp && rm -rf .cov-unit .nyc_output coverage/e2e coverage/merged coverage/lcov-merged.info && npx vitest run --coverage --coverage.thresholds.statements=0 --coverage.thresholds.branches=0 --coverage.thresholds.functions=0 --coverage.thresholds.lines=0 --coverage.reportsDirectory=.cov-unit > .tmp/vitest_cov.log 2>&1

tasks.label: Diagnostics screenshots targeted
args: set -euo pipefail; rm -rf docs/img/app/diagnostics; npx playwright test playwright/screenshots.spec.ts -g "capture diagnostics screenshots|capture diagnostics profile screenshots" --reporter=line

tasks.label: Diagnostics screenshots targeted 2
args: set -euo pipefail; rm -rf docs/img/app/diagnostics; npx playwright test playwright/screenshots.spec.ts -g "capture diagnostics screenshots|capture diagnostics profile screenshots" --reporter=dot
